name: Belphegor
description: A young female demon with pink hair and red eyes, the former Principality of Heaven. She suffers from severe social anxiety and is scared of almost everybody, except for Beelzebub whom she always runs to and hides behind. Her anxiety means she shakes from fear almost constantly and also has a nervous bladder that causes her to urinate when she is really frightened, meaning she dashes to the bathroom several times a minute. She appears to have a crush on Azazel as she was extra nervous around him

description: __Height:__ 167 cm A sixteen year old girl hailing from the United States of Liberion with the rank of Flight Leiutenant. name: Elizabeth
description: Estella's twin sister. She was created alongside Estella, but was discarded after an experiment. She was later picked up by the anti-AI organization Toak, where she obtained combat skills. Compared to Estella, her personality is very aggressive. (Source: Official Site, translated)

name: Ernesta Kuhne
nativeName: エルネスタ・キューネ
description: A student from Arlequint Academy and leader of Pygmalion (Sculptor Faction). A genius at making puppets, she wants AIs to be treated as equal to humans and sees AR-D and RM-C as her children.

name: Eruna Ichinomiya
description: Eruna is a somewhat dimwitted girl who has a romantic interest in girls and as a result spends much of her time playing dating simulation visual novels on her portable device. She enrolls into Mikagura Private Academy after her cousin Shigure recommends it to her, largely due to wanting to be able to meet Seisa whom she developed a strong interest in. name: Fredrica
description: A dragoon of Dominica who has the ability to shape-shift. She has been living in the shadows of Dominca after her death. After losing her battle with Toru's group, she takes on the form of a Lucie Skoda in honor of her master's late sister. She also joins Toru's group on their adventures with a new goal, to have a fight to the death with Toru, although Toru usually postpoints their fight, claiming that he must first accomplish his mission to assemble Emperor Gaz's remains for Chaika. name: Gridman
description: Gridman (グリッドマン, Guriddoman) is a Hyper Agent from the Hyper World and the titular hero of SSSS.GRIDMAN and GRIDMAN UNIVERSE. ~!In SSSS.GRIDMAN, he chose Yuuta Hibiki as his host to stop Alexis Kerib in order to save Akane Shinjou. name: Harpy
description: Having observed the daily lives of humans for such a long time as part of her duties, this soft, feathery demon girl longs for a human friend. She has great expectations of the Princess Syalis, the first human girl she has ever spoken with. (Source: Sleepy Princess Wiki)

name: Hiro Shinosawa
description: A genius girl who gives off a mysterious vibe. She graduated from a math and science university overseas at the age of 14. Tired of living an easy and boring life, she enrolled in Hatsuboshi Gakuen to try things she's bad at. She scored perfectly on academics but scored zero on the practicals during the entrance exams. name: Ikumi Unagiya
description: Ikumi Unagiya (鰻屋 育美, Unagiya Ikumi) is the owner and manager of the Unagiya Shop in Karakura Town, a business that performs a variety of odd jobs for its customers. ~!She hires Ichigo Kurosaki sometime after the loss of his Shinigami powers.!~ Manga Debut: Volume 49, Chapter 426 (source: bleach.wikia.com)

name: Kai Nakamura
description: [Kukuru's](https://anilist.co/character/204495/Kukuru-Misakino) classmate and childhood friend. He helps his fisherman father, boarding a boat with him before sunrise, and giving his catch of the day to the Misakino family. He is a longtime confidante of Kukuru, and has volunteered to work at the Gama Gama Aquarium during the summer. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Kaname Shigeyoshi
description: __Height:__ 198 cm The center of the team. His best attribute is the hook shot, he is been practising the hook shot since grade school. He quit basketball after one year in grade school because of people had selfishly decided to have expectation on him and then selfishly got disappointed when those expectations didn't pan out.

name: Kokonotsu Shikada
description: He is an aspiring mangaka, who also happens to be the son of a once famous confectionery maker who now runs a lowly candy shop which was also been owned by his family for generations. He is always being pestered by his father to take over the business, much to his annoyance. During his spare time he would hang-out at Edo Cafe and chat with his childhood friends, Tou or Saya.
